steps.assistant_text: Retracted a documented 'not reachable from C' $a1 cap. (1) Color-base derived destructively through q itself (q=self->0x8C; q=(int*)((char*)q+0xC4)): same-name web reuse binds the base web to $a1 (q's later call-arg constraint), fixing the a1/v1 cascade and the addiu schedule swap — the old param-overwrite probe failed because reassigning a PARAM s-promotes the whole var; reusing a LOCAL splits webs cleanly. (2) volatile int pad (uninitialized, unused) as third named local homes at 36(sp) and drops the lazy-flag spilltemp to 32(sp), frame unchanged.
